docSubtitle: On-chain proof issued by the IMGEUM Protocol
notFound: No evidence record found for this ID.

verification.explainer: This record is trustless. Re-check the employer's identity yourself: feed the Dojang attestation UID into the EAS contract on GIWA, or open the source vault on the explorer. You do not need to trust IMGEUM or the worker.

legal.statement: This document certifies that as of the recorded timestamp, the wages contracted through the referenced on-chain vault were not fully escrowed by the payout deadline. The record is immutable and was minted as a non-transferable token to the worker named above.
legal.forOfficial: For submission to the Ministry of Employment and Labor (고용노동부) or a court.
legal.printHint: Use Print to produce a clean paper copy (both languages).
